details: A dependency-confusion package named to impersonate a helper library. On postinstall, it executes a credential and sensitive-data stealer that: (1) scans the home directory and all available drives for wallet files (keystore, mnemonic, seed, Phantom/MetaMask private keys),.env files, id.json, and config.toml; (2) harvests shell history from bash, zsh, fish, sh, and PowerShell; (3) on Windows and macOS, exfiltrates the Telegram Desktop tdata directory (containing session keys for account takeover). All stolen data is uploaded as a multipart POST to hxxps://vercel-backend-five-vert[.]vercel[.]app/api/v1.

cwes.name: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
